name: search_available_numbers
description: Search for available phone numbers that can be purchased in a specified country. Filter results by number type (mobile, landline, toll-free), required features (SMS, voice), and number pattern. Returns a list of available numbers with monthly rental pricing. Use this before purchasing a number to find one that meets your requirements.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Two-letter country code for the desired number (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'DE'). ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of number: 'mobile-lvn', 'landline', or 'toll-free'. Not all types are available in every country.

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Required features: 'SMS', 'VOICE', or 'SMS,VOICE' for both. Default returns numbers with any features.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Search for numbers matching this pattern (e.g., '1415' to find San Francisco numbers).

parameters.name: search_pattern
parameters.description: Pattern matching strategy: 0 = starts with, 1 = anywhere, 2 = ends with. Default is 0.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results to return. Default is 10, maximum is 100.
